name: Grilled Chicken Breasts with Gazpacho Salsa (Courtesy Gourmet Magazine)
recipeIngredient: 1 garlic clove, minced and mashed to a paste
2 tablespoons olive oil plus additional for brushing the chicken
1/4 teaspoon ground cumin, or to taste
1 slice of homemade-type white bread, torn into pieces
2 plum tomatoes, seeded and chopped fine
1/2 cup finely chopped, seeded and peeled cucumber
1/3 cup finely chopped green bell pepper
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh coriander or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, blend together the garlic paste, vinegar, 2 tablespoons of oil, water, cumin, Tabasco, bread, half the tomatoes, and salt and pepper to taste until the mixture is smooth.
2. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in the remaining tomatoes, cucumber, bell pepper, onion, and coriander or parsley.
3. Brush the chicken with additional oil and season it with salt and pepper.
4. Grill the chicken on a rack set 5 to 6 inches over glowing coals, or in a hot well-seasoned ridged grill pan, covered, over moderately high heat for 5 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
5. Cut the chicken diagonally into 1/4-inch-thick slices and serve with the salsa.
Yield: 2 servings
